title: Kimi 发布并开源最新代码模型 Kimi-K2.7-Code
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Kimi.ai
@Kimi_Moonshot
🌘 Kimi-K2.7-Code, our latest coding model, is now released and open-sourced!
🔷 Improved coding & agent performance over K2.6: +21.8% on Kimi Code Bench v2, +11.0% on Program Bench, and +31.5% on MLS Bench Lite.
🔷 Reasoning efficiency: Less overthinking, with 30% lower reas red to K2.6.
🔷 Long-horizon coding: Improved instruction following, higher end-to-end coding task success rates.
⚡️ 6x High-Speed Mode coming soon!
🔌 Available today via Kimi API and Kimi Code.
🔗 Kimi Code: kimi.com/code
🔗 API: platform.moonshot.ai
10:16 AM · Jun 12, 2026 1.4M Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: Kimi 发布并开源最新代码模型 Kimi-K2.7-Code
discovery_record.discovery_summary: Kimi 发布并开源最新代码模型 Kimi-K2.7-Code。相比 K2.6，其在 Kimi Code Bench v2 上提升 +21.8%，Program Bench 提升 +11.0%，MLS Bench Lite 提升 +31.5%。推理效率改进，推理 token 使用量降低 30%，长时编码任务中指令遵循和端到端成功率均提升。6x 高速模式即将推出，即日起可通过 Kimi API 和 Kimi Code 使用。

key_excerpts.text: Kimi 发布并开源最新代码模型 Kimi-K2.7-Code。相比 K2.6，其在 Kimi Code Bench v2 上提升 +21.8%，Program Bench 提升 +11.0%，MLS Bench Lite 提升 +31.5%。推理效率改进，推理 token 使用量降低 30%，长时编码任务中指令遵循和端到端成功率均提升。6x 高速模式即将推出，即日起可通过 Kimi API 和 Kimi Code 使用。

## key_excerpts

1. [number / daily_observation, heatmap, case, trend / high] Kimi 发布并开源最新代码模型 Kimi-K2.7-Code。相比 K2.6，其在 Kimi Code Bench v2 上提升 +21.8%，Program Bench 提升 +11.0%，MLS Bench Lite 提升 +31.5%。推理效率改进，推理 token 使用量降低 30%，长时编码任务中指令遵循和端到端成功率均提升。6x 高速模式即将推出，即日起可通过 Kimi API 和 Kimi Code 使用。
2. [company_action / daily_observation, heatmap, change, case, trend / high] Post Log in Sign up Post Kimi.
3. [company_action / daily_observation, heatmap, change, case, trend / high] ai @Kimi_Moonshot 🌘 Kimi-K2.
4. [product_update / daily_observation, heatmap, change / high] 7-Code, our latest coding model, is now released and open-sourced!
5. [company_action / daily_observation, heatmap, change, case, trend / high] 🔷 Improved coding & agent performance over K2.
6. [number / daily_observation, heatmap, case, trend / high] 8% on Kimi Code Bench v2, +11.
